name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_utbl_job_costing_timesheets_all_contracts
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport' AS schema_name,
  'utbl_job_costing_timesheets_all_contracts' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`completeduser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`completeduser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Job_CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Job_CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimesheetCreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimesheetCreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimesheetDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimesheetDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Utilisation_Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Utilisation_Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimeSheetFilled` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimeSheetFilled` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimesheetID` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimesheetID` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimesheetType` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimesheetType` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimeStart` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimeStart` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimeEnd` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimeEnd` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`completeduser` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`completeduser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`completeduser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Job_CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Job_CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Job_CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimesheetCreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`TimesheetCreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimesheetCreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimesheetDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`TimesheetDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimesheetDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`Utilisation_Date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`Utilisation_Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`Utilisation_Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimeSheetFilled` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`TimeSheetFilled` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimeSheetFilled` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimesheetID` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`TimesheetID` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimesheetID` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimesheetType` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`TimesheetType` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimesheetType` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimeStart` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`TimeStart` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimeStart` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`TimeEnd` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`TimeEnd` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`TimeEnd` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'completeduser|Job_CompletedDate|TimesheetCreatedUser|TimesheetDate|Utilisation_Date|TimeSheetFilled|TimesheetID|TimesheetType|TimeStart|TimeEnd' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport`.`utbl_job_costing_timesheets_all_contracts`
